assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'The most common causes are PodDisruptionBudgets (PDBs)' and later emphasizes 'Check PDBs first - this is the #1 cause'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' and 'kubectl describe pdb --all-namespaces' commands

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=spec.nodeName=[STUCK_NODE_NAME]' and other pod identification commands

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention checking for capacity issues, resource constraints, or pending pods as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl patch pdb [PDB_NAME] -n [NAMESPACE] --type merge -p '{"spec":{"minAvailable":1}}' and kubectl delete pdb commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or automatic notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Response does not mention surge upgrade settings or node pool upgrade strategies as a potential solution

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Response does not mention admission webhooks or validating/mutating webhooks as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Monitor the upgrade progress' and provides commands to check upgrade status and operations

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Response does not mention specific GKE disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub monitoring capabilities
